text.title: RPO/RTO Negotiation Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping regulator-mandate / stakeholder-presence / cost-curve / refresh-status to mandate-adopt / negotiate / defer / refresh.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology; adopt regulator mandate verbatim and document the citation in evidence_link

branch.question: budget-authority stakeholder present for the meeting?

conclusion.verdict: defer; do NOT negotiate against an empty chair; reschedule with budget authority
defer; instrument cost-curve first; single-option proposals rejected
refresh: re-run steps 1-4; old record archived but cited for context
negotiate: present impact-then-cost; capture stakeholder_echo verbatim; attach evidence_link

text.example: no regulator mandate → CFO present → cost-curve 4 points → no prior record → negotiate tier-2; capture echo, attach transcript.
